message:
feat(web): add NTM, CASS, and SLB UI pages (bd-2gkx.7)

Add dedicated pages for tools that had API routes but no UI surfaces:
- NTM: notification filtering, mark-read, preferences summary
- CASS: session search with lexical/semantic modes and viewer
- SLB: pending approvals, request history, sessions, command tier check

Includes skeletons, router wiring, and sidebar navigation entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
